title: osteospermum apterum
intro: Osteospermum apterum, also known as the barbed daisy or Cape daisy, is a perennial plant species native to the Western and Southern Cape provinces of South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of osteospermum apterum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparation of osteospermum apterum typically involves infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions, or using the plant's extract in capsule or tincture form for concentrated medicinal benefits.
